steps.t: Spalvi Stout-heart is in Durin's Threshold, just inside the western entrance to Moria. Spalvi has decided that following the Iron Garrison into Moria …
Ketill Map-maker is in the Dolven-view, located in the Great Delving of Moria. Spalvi has heard that a dwarf with the Iron Garrison named Ketill is ma…
Ketill Map-maker can be found perched on a wall overlooking Gazatmur, east of the Dolven-view.
Ketill Map-maker can be found on the highest ledge in the middle of the library of Katûb-zahar, north-east of the Dolven-view.
Spalvi is in the Dolven-view, in the Great Delving of Moria.
